response.justification: Bogdan has over 20 years of software engineering experience and a strong entrepreneurial background as the founder of GISCollective, easily meeting the minimum requirements for engineering tenure and education. He also shows a strong track record of technical innovation and community building through open-source projects and workshops. However, while he has recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, his profile leans more toward a Staff Full-Stack Developer rather than a Director-level AI strategist, and he lacks the preferred advanced degree or deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML platforms.
strengths: Over 20 years of software engineering experience, exceeding the 15-year minimum requirement.
Valuable entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Demonstrated passion for engineering leadership and knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks an advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
AI experience appears limited to recent tooling (MCP, agentic workflows) rather than deep, strategic AI/ML platform leadership.
Has not held a Principal or Director-level title, mostly functioning as a Senior or Staff Developer.
